production_approval.reason: Canary-only safety refresh from runs/portfolio-weekly-selector-research-20260702T082455.238157000Z-p74314-s0. The prior July 1 approval no longer clears current account-budget drawdown checks under the 7897.67 sleeve. This replacement keeps the live scope debit-spread-only, removes SOFI, adds MDB, raises the approved capital denominator to 45000, and tightens live heat to 2% max symbol allocation, max 1 open position, and max 1 position per symbol, so per-symbol/open debit exposure is capped near 900. The full-history run used 2010-01-01 through 2026-06-30, 100000 research gate denominator, cache-only snapshot-backed data, and produced 682 allocated trades, 87191.50 raw PnL, 70141.50 $25-cost PnL, 52.1% win rate, 3.25 profit factor, 65.06 trades/year, 4.81% account-budget capital DD, and 8.46% $25-cost account-budget capital DD. Recent-regime validation passed with 211 trailing trades and 45709.50 $25-cost PnL. MDB passed the new-symbol check with 11 trades and 724.00 $25-cost PnL. Source canary status was canary_only rather than full_promotion_candidate because $25-cost PnL did not beat the superseded 104178.00 baseline; this approval is intentionally a safer canary-ready live envelope, not a full-size profit-maximizing promotion.
